questionHtml:
The equation p V T = constant is applied to a real gas where p is the pressure of the gas, V is its volume and T is its temperature.

What is correct about this equation?

A. It is empirical.

B. It is theoretical.

C. It cannot be tested.

D. It cannot be disproved.
